name: ssh-ops
description: MCP and CLI helpers for running SSH-based server operations through reusable profiles.

interface.shortDescription: Run reusable SSH inventory, health, disk, and command tasks.
interface.longDescription: SSH Ops exposes a small MCP server and CLI wrapper for remote Linux server checks. It reuses the local ssh binary, existing SSH config, and optional profile files without storing passwords or private keys.
defaultPrompt: Check my server hardware with SSH Ops.
Run a disk report on my default SSH profile.
Show failed services on my SSH server.
